settings.label: Verification token
settings.info: Paste only the content value from the <meta name=google-site-verification content=...> tag Search Console gives you.

settings.label: Bing verification token
settings.info: Optional. Paste the content value from the msvalidate.01 meta tag.

settings.label: Homepage LCP product handle
settings.info: Used to preload the homepage hero image (cuts LCP). Match the handle of the product pinned to the Hero section.
